programme.title: VR+
programme.desc: El universo musical de Video Rola, sus grandes exponentes y contenido exclusivo lo tenemos reunido para ti en VR+. 24 horas con los videos más destacados de los géneros musicales más populares en español. VR+ es más MÚSICA PARA TUS OJOS.

programme.title: Moogly: Subtle Stitches
programme.desc: Subtle crochet stitches to add a spark to your crochet

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Double Your Drawer Storage
programme.desc: A simple modification makes use of that empty vertical drawer space.

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Pare Essentials
programme.desc: In this episode, Marc works on two different projects. Learn how to finish up a step stool and Japanese cocktail table in one video!

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Quick High-Quality Shop Cabinets
programme.desc: A new set of custom cabinets with oodles of storage!

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Protecting Outdoor Furniture with Epoxy Feet
programme.desc: Mother Nature always wins. So when you make outdoor furniture you have two choices: commit to a regular maintenance schedule or come to terms with the weathered gray look. An easy thing you can do to help the cause is to prevent moisture from entering into the legs. This simple trick requires nothing more than epoxy and masking tape.

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: The Taper Maker
programme.desc: Make your own tapering sled using our plans and hardware kit.

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: VerySuperCool Tools After-Market Tablesaw Fence
programme.desc: The guys over at VerySuperCool Tools recently gave me an opportunity to test out one of their new products: an after-market fence system. The great thing about this unit is that it works perfectly with existing Biesemeyer-style fences. So installation is as simple as dropping it on the rail and performing a standard fence calibration.

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Shellac Under Polyurethane
programme.desc: I decided to do a little experiment for myself. I wanted to see if I could find any evidence of a weakened bond between polyurethane and waxed shellac, when the shellac is used in a typical manner as a sealer.

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Executive Desk With Wireless Charging and Hidden Drawer
programme.desc: An executive desk with classic styling and modern amenities.

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Gaming Dining Table
programme.desc: Nicole and I are big gamers, be they video, dice, cards or classic board games. So when I was tasked with building a new dining table I knew I wanted it to be multi-purpose, serving our needs for meals as well as gaming. And so was born the Gaming Dining Table.

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Hidden Wireless Charging in a Desk Top
programme.desc: Wireless charging is cool. Wireless charging that is completely hidden is even cooler! When I built my Executive Desk, I knew I wanted to include wireless charging as a feature but I didn't want to look at a charging pad all the time.

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: I Bought a Sawstop! - First Impressions
programme.desc: I bought a SawStop. Hopefully I won't regret it.

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Sketch Up Design for an Arts & Crafts Table
programme.desc: Marc teaches how to sketch up design for a new exciting project - arts & crafts table.

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Cross-Cut Sled Slot Repair
programme.desc: One of the primary benefits of a cross-cut sled is the fact that the base provides zero-clearance, supporting the work through the entire cut and producing near tearout-free results. Over time, regular use can cause that slot to widen. Here's how you can fix it, without having to rebuild.

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Knock Down Trestle Table Part 2
programme.desc: We finish up building the Trestle Table and focus on Braces, Top, Wedges & Finishing.

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Low Entertainment Center Part 5
programme.desc: I assemble and attach the base, install the handles, and apply the final finish to the top. This project was an incredible learning experience, and not in the way you might think. I actually found it challenging to step back from my primary shop tools, and focus only on the portable power tools. I have a new found appreciation for the tools I have been taking granted for years.

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: A Napkin Holder for My Special Lady
programme.desc: A beautiful napkin holder made from live edge birdseye maple.

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Rocking Horse Part 2
programme.desc: The second and final video in this series covers finishing and assembly. As with any project, you should always ask yourself if it might be better to pre-finish the parts. Since the rocking horse would be incredibly difficult to finish after assembly and all of our parts are screwed together, pre-finishing was a no-brainer.

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: So Excited! The Firehouse is Ours!
programme.desc: We closed on the firehouse. Now what?!

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Elevated Dog Bowl - WFC 2019
programme.desc: A fun project for your four-legged pals.

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Shop Update - Tool Wall - Garage Door Cover - New Fans - DC Upgrades
programme.desc: Almost before I realized what was happening, I found myself fully engaged in phase 2 of my garage to shop conversion. 2x4s were purchased, nails were driven, and organization was born!

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Gadget Station Part 3
programme.desc: This episode is primarily focused on the design of the legs. I present several options and show how I create a basic template. At the end, you will see the final test leg. The process of cutting the leg itself will be covered in detail when we cut the final legs out of the bubinga stock.

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Salt Cellar
programme.desc: After posting the video for the Kitchen Helper, several folks asked if I built the little salt cellar we have in our kitchen. I didn't. But I decided the design was straightforward enough that I'd try to make a copy for myself and maybe a few extra as gifts. If you or someone in your life loves to cook, you are definitely going to want to make a few!

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: DIY Kids School Desk - Quick - Easy - Inexpensive!
programme.desc: A one-day build using 1/4 sheet of plywood and a 2x4.

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Safety Gear Upgrades
programme.desc: There aren't usually a lot of new innovations in the world of woodworking safety gear but there are occasional improvements that can really make a practical difference in the shop. Let's take a look at a few such improvements in eye, lung, and hearing protection.

programme.title: Origami Tessellations - Advent of Tess: 2023 Day 20 - Firecracker
programme.desc: Madonna teaches Firecracker.

programme.title: Learn Origami
programme.desc: In Japanese Origami literally means "folding paper". In this programme learn the art of origami with designs that are both simple and rewarding. From the purity and ease of a rowing boat, to the intricacies and precision of a lover's knot, or a flapping bird. These are classic origami designs that will hopefully lead to a love of the craft.

programme.title: FaveCrafts: Butterfly DIY Wall Decor
programme.desc: Decorate your walls with handmade butterfly decor!

programme.title: Creative Living with Lynn Lilly: Baking Summer Craft and Fun
programme.desc: Join DIY expert and mom, Lynn Lilly as she welcomes creatives, chefs, moms and entrepreneurs to the Craft Box Girls Studio. In today's show we're getting the latest summer beauty hacks from guest Emily Foley and stepping into some tie dye fun the kids are sure to love.

programme.title: Origami Tessellations - Advent of Tess: Day 19 - CT Linked Flowers
programme.desc: Madonna teaches CT Linked Flowers.

programme.title: Creative Living with Lynn Lilly: First Day of School Memories
programme.desc: Join DIY expert and mom, Lynn Lilly as she welcomes creatives, chefs, moms and entrepreneurs to the Craft Box Girls Studio. In today's show we are making first day of school memories.

programme.title: Digital Painting - Frog Food: Attempting Comics - Speed Paint
programme.desc: What’s up guys, for today’s Frog Food we’re exploring new horizons in this cool comic style piece. From inspiration to workflow we gotcha covered, so sit back, relax, and enjoy.

programme.title: The Crafty Chica: DIY Beaded Plant
programme.desc: Viral Beaded Plant with The Crafty Chica

programme.title: Origami Tessellations - Advent of Tess: 2023 Day 9 - Wagon Wheel
programme.desc: Madonna teaches Wagon Wheel.

programme.title: Digital Painting - Frog Food: DIY Anime Poster "METRO" - Speed Paint
programme.desc: This is our first Frog Food of 2021 so let's hit the ground running and try something new: A detailed background! But not too detailed ... remember, baby steps. Join me for a little speed drawing and commentary!

programme.title: FaveCrafts: Vintage Inspired DIY Barrette Hair Accessories
programme.desc: Learn how to make vintage inspired barrette hair accessories.

programme.desc: Madonna teaches Sawtooth.

programme.desc: Join DIY expert and mom, Lynn Lilly as she welcomes creatives, chefs, moms and entrepreneurs to the Craft Box Girls Studio. It's Lynn's Birthday and what better way to celebrate than with Healthy Chef and Partyologist, Nancy Waldeck.

programme.desc: Let's create long from art foamies in this Art Foamies 101 class! Craft Kathy Cano-Murillo!

programme.title: Fabric to Fashion
programme.desc: Fabric to Fashion is a reality show featuring designers and sewist from all over the world. Designers are given a challenge, then we follow the guests designing in their own sewing spaces. Angela Wolf mentors and guides the designers throughout each challenge, and often throws in a few extra twists!
